name: mirror-action
description: GitHub Action to sync, validate, and release PIE-compatible PHP extension mirrors

scripts.test:cov: node --test --experimental-test-module-mocks --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-include='src/**/*.js' tests/index.test.js tests/composer.test.js tests/config.test.js tests/git.test.js tests/github.test.js tests/hooks.test.js tests/matrix.test.js tests/release.test.js tests/resolve-matrix.test.js tests/validate.test.js tests/versions.test.js tests/sync.test.js
